OrderDate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
Purchase order date and must be supplied in YYMMDD format, valid for Visa.
OrderNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.MOTOECommerce
Order number for MOTO/e-Commerce.
OrigAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
Original total amount.
OrigECRRefNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The original ECR reference number, This is an unique code in ECR side.
Original - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Original.

OrigPaymentType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The original payment type.
OrigRefNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Original terminal reference number used for follow-up transactions.
OrigSTAN - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
Orig STAN for later Void/POSTAUTH trans.
OrigTip - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentTransInfo
The original tip amount for CREDIT ADJUSTMENT.
OrigTraceNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Original trace number which is returned in response host information.
OrigTransAuthCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
Original transaction auth code.
OrigTransDateTime - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
Original transaction date and time "YYMMDDHHMMSS"
OrigTransType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.TORResponseInfo
Original Transaction Type, i.e.
OseToPpse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
0 - Normal flow (default)
1 - Stop vas and do payment directly
